'''Haaran Balmor''' was a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]].

==Biography==
Balmor played [[Divoran holochess|Divoran Holochess]] with [[Hart Daele]] via [[Projective Telepathy|projective telepathy]] for around forty [[Standard year/Legends|years]]. He lived on [[Damualer Triac]] with his second wife, [[Hannah Balmor]]. Balmor also enjoyed holographic painting. An interview with Balmor was included in ''[[Heroes Of The Republic]]'', a [[Book/Legends|book]] written by [[Madelein Aurin]] and published by [[Sarlain Star Press]].

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=The Divoran Holochess Players|book=Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim}} {{1st}}
